title: lathyrus vestitus subsp. laetiflorus
intro: Lathyrus vestitus subsp. laetiflorus, also known as the fragrant pea or fragrant pea vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lathyrus vestitus subsp. laetiflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
